# services.mpdris2

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.mpdris2`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| ------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `services.mpdris2.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable mpDris2 the MPD to MPRIS2 bridge. |
| `services.mpdris2.mpd.host` | `string` | The address where MPD is listening for connections. |
| `services.mpdris2.mpd.musicDirectory` | `null or absolute path` | If set, mpDris2 will use this directory to access music artwork. |
| `services.mpdris2.mpd.password` | `null or string` | The password to connect to MPD. |
| `services.mpdris2.mpd.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port number where MPD is listening for connections. |
| `services.mpdris2.multimediaKeys` | `boolean` | Whether to enable multimedia key support. |
| `services.mpdris2.notifications` | `boolean` | Whether to enable song change notifications. |
| `services.mpdris2.package` | `package` | The mpdris2 package to use. |
